posts.author: amybronstein (Amy Bronstein)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone! I’m Amy, monday.com’s Social Engagement Manager, nice to meet you all

We’re looking for team and department managers to join a quick 45-min chat about your work goals and challenges. Come help shape the future of monday.com! (Amazon gift card included )

Interested? Click here to share your details and someone will reach out to you soon!
